justification: Smoke test passed; happy-path login shows demo toast within 1.8s on prod build. form.requestSubmit() confirmed working. No error state visible.
'Forgot password?' link navigates to /forgot-password. Navigation confirmed via page.url() assertion after click. ASVS-2.5.1 satisfied.

TOTP enrollment requires Supabase Enroll toggle (separate from Verify flag) — demo-dashboard has no TOTP backend wired. Blocking sign-off until the operational runbook documents the required Supabase project config and a real TOTP endpoint is wired to the demo. ASVS-2.8.1 and ASVS-2.8.3 cannot be asserted in demo mode.

Rate-limit TC placed last in spec (per @rate-limit-test annotation convention). 6 wrong-password attempts trigger error state in demo; each iteration used a distinct X-Forwarded-For header. ASVS-2.2.1 satisfied for demo surface. Promoted to accepted pending real-backend validation.
page.title() returns 'Sign In — Apex Dashboard'. WCAG-2.4.2 satisfied. Title contains 'Sign In' substring — confirmed across Chromium and WebKit.
